Document:
# Major Crimes - These crimes are high severity.
Charge
Description
Punishment
Unauthorised Deployment
\- To deploy into the area of operations without permission of the relevant head of department or [color=#008000][bold]Commander[/bold][/color], whilst still performing assigned duties, such as a doctor performing surgery.\nDeploying without intent to perform assigned duties is [bold]Desertion[/bold]. \n- The relevant Head of Department or the [color=#008000][bold]Commander[/bold][/color] where appropriate may retroactively authorize deployment and negate the crime. The [color=#008000][bold]Commander[/bold][/color] may overrule the decision. \n- The relevant Head of Department or the [color=#008000][bold]Commander[/bold][/color] may designate an alternate person to deploy to replace an unauthorized person as soon as possible.
[bold]10 Minutes.[/bold]
Disorderly Conduct
\- Directly and intentionally disrupting primary operations of the warship. Fighting in the requisitions line, extensively or repeatedly disrupting the briefing.
[bold]10 Minutes.[/bold]
Subterfuge
\- Taking action, or being tied to material that describes planned actions that go against the UNMC. Strong proof is required that the individual is working against the UNMC.
[bold]15 Minutes, removal of ID, and discharge to planet.[/bold]
Neglect of Duty
\- Failure to perform one’s role to an acceptable standard. \n\- A [color=#008000][bold]Commander[/bold][/color] failing to properly organize and ensure their personnel are given orders. \n\- Failing to perform one's duties or follow proper procedure in detriment of one's duties.
[bold]15 Minutes.[/bold]
Assault
\- To threaten or use physical force against someone with ill intent, but without intent to kill. \n\- To threaten murder.
[bold]15 Minutes.[/bold]
Prevarication
\- To intentionally arrest a person on false charges, on ones own initiative. \n\- To apply an improper or abusive NJP.
[bold]20 Minutes.[/bold]
Illegal Confinement
\- Unlawfully detaining a person against their will, such as Kidnapping, and hostage-taking.
[bold]20 Minutes.[/bold]
Misuse of Authority
\- The exercising of power to a [bold]malicious extent[/bold] by [color=#ff000d][bold]MP[/bold][/color]. \n\- Excessive use of harmful or non-lethal force, or other abusive actions that led to the harm of a person in custody.\n\- Detained suspects should not have more force used on them than necessary in order to pacify them and ensure they do not escape during processing.
[bold]20 Minutes.[/bold]
Manslaughter
\- Killing someone without malicious intent. Manslaughter may be applied if someone dies as a result of a fight where the intent was not to kill. \n\- This also includes failing to revive someone without a reasonable attempt, not executed by the execution procedure.
[bold]20 Minutes, and/or demotion.[/bold]
Cruelty to Animals
\- Injuring or killing any domestic animal or wild life with malicious intent. Research monkeys used for chemical research, scientific purposes or hostile wildlife are exempt.
[bold]30 Minutes.[/bold]
